summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 8 — Publish Governance (Supply Activation). Backend: 39/39 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working including PublishQueue with 5 tabs, PublishDetail with 5 panels (Readiness/Preview/Versions/Actions/Audit), action modals, ranking eligibility, and audit trail.

publish_queue_endpoint.tab_ready: PASS - Returns owner_onboarding_completed and publish_ready venues
publish_queue_endpoint.readiness_posture: PASS - Items include publish_readiness and readiness_score

readiness_endpoint.7_point_gate: PASS - Returns 7 checks: owner_onboarding, identity_fields, media_minimum, pricing_posture, publishable_summary, no_risk_flags, venue_active
readiness_endpoint.check_structure: PASS - Each check has id, label, passed, detail, required

preview_endpoint.public_schema: PASS - Returns venue_id, name, slug, city, area, venue_type, capacity, pricing, images, description

publish_endpoint.blocked_when_not_ready: PASS - Returns 400 when readiness checks fail

versions_endpoint.structure: PASS - Returns has_live, has_draft, has_approved, live_version, draft_version, last_approved_version
versions_endpoint.diff_calculation: PASS - Returns diff array when live and draft differ

save_draft_endpoint.works: PASS - Saves draft without affecting live

audit_endpoint.returns_trail: PASS - Returns audit array with action history

ranking_endpoint.invalid_value: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid ranking value
ranking_endpoint.valid_values: PASS - Accepts not_eligible, eligible, blocked_quality, hidden

role_gating.rm_forbidden_all: PASS - RM cannot access any publish endpoints
role_gating.venue_manager_access: PASS - Venue manager can access all except archive
role_gating.admin_access_all: PASS - Admin can access all endpoints including archive

frontend_publish_queue.page_loads: PASS - PublishQueue page loads with data-testid='publish-queue'
frontend_publish_queue.tabs: PASS - All 5 tabs present (Ready, Live, Hidden, Unpublished, Archived)
frontend_publish_queue.venue_cards: PASS - Cards show venue name, location, type, capacity, photos, status badges, readiness badges
frontend_publish_queue.publish_governance_link: PASS - ManagerQueue has 'Publish Governance' quick-access link

frontend_publish_detail.page_loads: PASS - PublishDetail page loads with data-testid='publish-detail'
frontend_publish_detail.panel_tabs: PASS - All 5 panel tabs present (Readiness, Preview, Versions, Actions, Audit)
frontend_publish_detail.readiness_panel: PASS - Shows 7 checks with pass/fail icons and details
frontend_publish_detail.preview_panel: PASS - Shows public venue card preview with image, name, location, capacity, price
frontend_publish_detail.actions_panel: PASS - Shows Hide, Unpublish, Promote, Ranking, Archive buttons
frontend_publish_detail.audit_panel: PASS - Shows chronological history of publish actions

frontend_action_modals.hide_modal: PASS - Opens with reason input and Confirm Hide button
frontend_action_modals.reason_required: PASS - Confirm button disabled without reason

frontend_ranking_eligibility.section_expands: PASS - Ranking Eligibility section expands on click
frontend_ranking_eligibility.options: PASS - Shows 4 options (Not Eligible, Eligible, Blocked Quality, Hidden)

publish_button_disabled.when_not_ready: PASS - Publish button is disabled when readiness checks fail (5/7)

critical_code_review_comments: publish.py: Well-structured with clear role permissions (ROLE_CAN_PUBLISH, ROLE_CAN_ARCHIVE, etc.)
publish.py: 7-point readiness gate covers all critical checks (onboarding, identity, media, pricing, summary, risk, active)
publish.py: Proper audit trail with add_audit() helper for all actions
publish.py: Version discipline with live_version, draft_version, last_approved_version snapshots
publish.py: map_to_public_venue() correctly maps acquisition data to public venues collection schema
PublishQueue.js: Clean tab-based UI with status badges and readiness scores
PublishDetail.js: 5-panel layout (Readiness/Preview/Versions/Actions/Audit) with proper data-testid attributes
PublishDetail.js: Action modals with reason validation and confirm buttons
ManagerQueue.js: Publish Governance quick-access link properly integrated

test_credentials.admin: admin@venulock.in / admin123 (role: admin - can do everything including archive)
test_credentials.rm: rm1@venulock.in / rm123 (role: rm - should NOT have access to publish endpoints)

test_data.acq_pub_test_001: Grand Heritage Palace - published_live, 7/7 checks passed, eligible
test_data.acq_pub_test_002: Sunset Garden Resort - published_live with draft, eligible

seed_data_creation: Used seeded test data (acq_pub_test_001, acq_pub_test_002, acq_pub_test_003)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 Publish Governance fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/publish/* all working. Frontend routes at /team/field/publish (queue) and /team/field/publish/:acqId (detail). 7-point readiness gate blocks publishing when not ready. Role gating: venue_manager can publish/unpublish/hide/ranking; only admin can archive. Audit trail tracks all publish actions. Version discipline with live/draft/approved snapshots. All features working correctly.

real_apis: All publish governance endpoints are real (no mocking)
